name: Click Between Frames
description: Allows inputs to register between frames. Fixed for 2.2081 and Geode 5.0.3.

soft-toggle.name: Disable CBF
soft-toggle.description: Disable CBF/CoS without needing to restart GD. This option does not disable physics bypass if you have it enabled!

safe-mode.name: Safe Mode
safe-mode.description: Disable progress & stats on rated levels.

click-on-steps.name: Click on Steps
click-on-steps.description: Only register inputs with 240TPS precision. Should have identical physics to vanilla.

right-click.name: Right Click P2
right-click.description: Use right click for player 2 jump.

mouse-fix.name: Reduce Mouse Lag
mouse-fix.description:
Reduce lag when using high polling rate mice.
Experimental, may break things.

late-cutoff.name: Late Input Cutoff
late-cutoff.description:
Check for inputs near the end of the frame instead of the start.

Slayerly reduces input lag, but also slightly hurts precision.

thread-priority.name: Thread Priority
thread-priority.description: Whether to automatically set CBF's thread priority to the highest available.

physics-bypass.name: Enable Physics Bypass
physics-bypass.description: Reduces stuttering on some FPS values. Active even if "Disable CBF" is checked.

bypass-mode.name: Physics Bypass Mode
bypass-mode.description: 2.2 mode means as few collision checks per frame as possible.
